name: Synup Social vs. Tailwind
hero_summary: Tailwind should stick to Pinterest management. For visual content lovers looking to expand on Instagram, Facebook, X, and more, Synup Social is where it’s at. While Tailwind is great for keeping your feed picture-perfect, it can’t help you grow. For brands looking to build better posts, save time, and expand their reach, the switch to Synup is a no-brainer!
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: While Tailwind’s post-creation studio helps you build posts that fit your aesthetic to a T, a pretty picture only gets you so far. Synup empowers you to optimize your posts and actually get eyes on your content. Plus, you can get coverage across platforms like X and LinkedIn, too. Here’s why you’ll be happy you made the switch:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: Data-driven social media strategies get results. While Tailwind’s analytics are lacking, Synup’s post-by-post analysis will help you understand which of your posts are evergreen. Don’t just view your metrics at-a-glance; understand the nitty-gritty details of your audience engagement, so you can actually get eyes on your best posts!
section_2_slider_2_summary: From trend and competitor research to writing posts, content creation takes time. We put your post creation in the fast lane, helping you revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more - all in your distinct brand voice. While Tailwind gives you a nice studio, there’s no instruction for how to succeed. It’s time to change that!
section_2_slider_3_heading: Collaboration is the name of the game
section_2_step_3_summary: We make it easy to collaborate with your team and your clients - at no extra cost. Manage your posts with collaborative content creation and approval workflows. Plus, you can share white-labeled analytics and content calendars with clients. Get feedback directly on the platform, so you can create and revise with ease.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Tailwind doesn’t support multi-brand or multi-location posting, making it a drag for enterprises and agencies alike. With your Synup Social account, you can manage all your profiles in one place - whether you have ten profiles or ten thousand!
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Tailwind?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Tailwind and Synup Social are both renowned for their content-driven approach to social media management. While they’re both solid tools when it comes to content creation, post optimization, and analytics, Synup takes the cake. With more features and a support team that will lay their lives on the line for you, you’ll be mad you didn’t find a Tailwind alternative sooner. Here’s an in-depth look:
